description.ko: 백색광이 투명한 매질을 통해 본연의 색상으로 분리되는 순간을 포착하여, 복잡한 광학 현상을 구현하는 PRISM-2의 성능을 매혹적으로 탐구한 작품입니다.
description.en: A mesmerizing exploration of PRISM-2's ability to render complex optical phenomena, showcasing the moment white light splits into its fundamental colors through a crystal-clear medium.

prompt: Cinematic macro shot of a geometric glass prism refracting a single beam of pure white light into a vivid, multi-layered spectrum of colors, sharp edges, caustic light patterns dancing on a dark matte surface, high contrast, 8k resolution, photorealistic optical physics.
